name: Coconut-Peanut Brittle
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water, corn syrup, sugar, peanuts and salt in a heavy 4-quart saucepan.
2. Place the candy thermometer in the mixture and cook over high heat.
3. Stir frequently until the temperature reaches 290°F (143°C).
4. Remove from heat and add the soda. Stir thoroughly.
5. Gradually stir in the coconut.
6. Using well-buttered forks, stretch the mixture on a well-buttered surface such as cookie sheets.
7. Spoon out into piles and gently pull apart to create brittle pieces.
